M

main(String[]) - Static method in class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
Client entry point; launches the JavaFX application.
main(String[]) - Static method in class server.app.StartServer
Starts the server application.
main(String[]) - Static method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Launches the server GUI application.
MainShellController - Class in client.view
Controls the persistent shell: sidebar nav, topbar title, connection pill, the logged-in user chrome, and the contentArea swap point.
MainShellController(NetworkService, Session, Runnable) - Constructor for class client.view.MainShellController
Creates the main-shell controller.
MainShellController.NavItem - Record Class in client.view
One sidebar entry: the screen plus the rule deciding who may see it.
mainStage - Variable in class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
Primary stage, reused for the user-login screen and the main shell.
managerId - Variable in class common.dto.ParkDTO
Identifier of the park's manager (user.id), or null if none.
map - Variable in class server.subscription.SubscriptionRegistry
Subscription key → the set of sessions subscribed to it.
map(ResultSet) - Method in class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Maps the current row of a ResultSet (selected via NotificationDAO.SELECT_BASE) to a NotificationDTO, resolving the recipient's contact into the simulated target.
map(ResultSet) - Method in class server.dao.ParameterChangeDAO
Maps the current ResultSet row to a ParameterChangeRequestDTO.
map(ResultSet) - Method in class server.dao.ParkDAO
Maps the current ResultSet row to a ParkDTO.
map(ResultSet) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Maps the current row of a ResultSet to a ReservationDTO.
map(ResultSet) - Method in class server.dao.VisitDAO
Maps the current ResultSet row to a VisitDTO.
map(ResultSet) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Maps the current row of a ResultSet (selected via WaitlistDAO.SELECT_BASE) to a WaitlistEntryDTO.
markOffered(int, String) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Marks an entry as offered the freed slot: stamps grab_offered_at = NOW() and sets grab_expires_at to the supplied deadline (the caller computes it, typically one hour out).
markReminderSent(int) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Stamps reminder_sent_at = NOW() on a reservation, marking that its confirmation reminder has gone out so ReservationDAO.findReminderCandidates(int) will skip it on the next poll.
markSent(int) - Method in class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Marks a notification as delivered by stamping sent_at = NOW().
MAX_CAPACITY - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.ParamField
The park's maximum visitor capacity (park.max_capacity).
MAX_FAMILY_SIZE - Static variable in class client.view.SubscriberRegisterController
Upper bound for the family-size spinner; the DB default is 1.
MAX_GROUP_SIZE - Static variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Maximum party size for a guide-led group visit (mirrored on the server).
maxCapacity - Variable in class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
The park's maximum physical capacity.
maxCapacity - Variable in class common.dto.ParkDTO
Maximum visitor capacity.
maxCapValue - Variable in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Current max-capacity value.
memberDao - Variable in class server.control.AuthController
Member/visitor data access (subscriber and guide registration).
memberDao - Variable in class server.control.ReservationController
Upserts the booking visitor's contact so the FK holds and notifications have a target.
MemberDAO - Class in server.dao
Data access object for member registration: the visitor base row plus the subscriber and guide extension rows that a SERVICE_REP creates.
MemberDAO() - Constructor for class server.dao.MemberDAO
Creates the member DAO.
message - Variable in class common.dto.ServerResponse
Human-readable status/error message.
message(Throwable) - Static method in class server.util.ServerLog
A non-null message for t, falling back to its type when blank.
minuteCombo - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Minute dropdown (quarter-hour steps).
minuteCombo - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Minute dropdown (quarter-hour steps).
